title: Manager Motivation
description: Equity vs flat wages tradeoff. Managers without ownership stake run operations poorly. Sharing equity improves performance but costs potential profits. Finding the right incentive structure is key.
definition-of-done: Equity sharing option for managers. Equity improves manager performance. Flat wage option with lower performance. Motivation visible in manager details.
testing-plan: Verify equity sharing works. Test performance improvement. Verify flat wage penalty. Test motivation display.
